message:
Add native type inference and rebrand PyX to PyAOT

- Add type inference system (src/analysis/native_types.zig)
- Add native Zig codegen without PyObject overhead (src/codegen/native.zig)
- Update compiler pipeline to use native types
- Rebrand PyX to PyAOT across all tests, examples, and documentation

files.patch:
@@ -51,7 +51,7 @@ jobs:
         run: uv sync
 
       - name: Test compilation
-        run: uv run pyx examples/fibonacci.py -o test_output
+        run: uv run pyaot examples/fibonacci.py -o test_output
 
       - name: Run compiled binary
         run: ./test_output

@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-# Comprehensive test of all operators in PyX
+# Comprehensive test of all operators in PyAOT
 
 print(10)
 print(3)

@@ -1,8 +1,8 @@
 # Web Crawler Example - Sequential (Phase 1)
-# Demonstrates HTTP GET requests in PyX
+# Demonstrates HTTP GET requests in PyAOT
 #
-# NOTE: http_get() is a PyX built-in that returns (status_code, body) tuple
-# This example shows PyX can do network I/O
+# NOTE: http_get() is a PyAOT built-in that returns (status_code, body) tuple
+# This example shows PyAOT can do network I/O
 
 urls = ["http://example.com"]

@@ -1,9 +1,9 @@
 #!/bin/bash
 set -e
 
-# PyX Development Installation Script
+# PyAOT Development Installation Script
 
-echo "🔧 Setting up PyX development environment..."
+echo "🔧 Setting up PyAOT development environment..."
 
 # Check prerequisites
 command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "❌ Error: uv not installed. Install from https://docs.astral.sh/uv/"; exit 1; }

@@ -1,9 +1,9 @@
 #!/bin/bash
-# Verify PyX installation
+# Verify PyAOT installation

-echo "🔍 Verifying PyX installation..."
+echo "🔍 Verifying PyAOT installation..."
 echo ""
 
 # Check pyaot command exists
@@ -37,7 +37,7 @@ fi

 echo ""
-echo "✅ All checks passed! PyX is properly installed."
+echo "✅ All checks passed! PyAOT is properly installed."
 echo ""
 echo "Try: pyaot examples/fibonacci.py --run"
 echo ""
